name: Tortillas De Maiz
recipeInstructions:
1. The serving depends on the size of the tortillas you desire.
2. Mix the corn flour with water, adding as much water as needed until the dough is smooth and can easily form into a small ball in your hands.
3. Form the dough into balls.
4. Roll out the tortillas by hand or using a tortilla press.
5. Cook one side of the tortillas on a hot comal (griddle).
6. Flip the tortillas and cook the other side until they are golden brown.
7. If you do not have a comal, use a pan with Teflon coating.
